tagline: You Deserve a Picture Perfect Pool

hero.headline:
35+ Years Perfecting East Bay
Pools
hero.subheadline: From weekly maintenance to full pool construction, our family has kept East Bay pools picture perfect since 1990. Three contractor's licenses, IPSSA leadership, and one mission: so you never worry about your pool again.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block"> One Trusted Family
services.subtitle: Maintenance, construction, remodeling, and repair — all under one roof with triple contractor's licenses. No subcontractors, no runaround, just the Duncan family taking care of yours.

cards.title: Residential Pool Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly maintenance that keeps your pool crystal clear and chemically balanced year-round. Skimming, vacuuming, filter care, and water testing — all handled.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Reliable maintenance for HOAs, apartment complexes, and public facilities. Health regulation compliance, consistent scheduling, and detailed reporting you can count on.

cards.title: Pool Construction
cards.description: Custom pool design and construction from concept to first splash. Built to the highest standards with decades of hands-on experience and a C-53 contractor's license.

cards.title: Pool Remodeling
cards.description: Breathe new life into your backyard with updated surfaces, tile, coping, decking, and modern water features. Transform your pool without starting from scratch.

cards.title: Pool Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair for heaters, pumps, motors, filters, plumbing, and surfaces. Most issues resolved on the first visit to minimize your downtime.

cards.title: Reverse Osmosis Services
cards.description: Advanced water purification that restores pool water quality without draining. Save thousands of gallons of water while reducing chemical use and improving clarity.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Picture Perfect Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll schedule an on-site evaluation. Brian or his team will assess your pool's condition, discuss your goals, and provide an honest quote — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Take It From Here
steps.description: Our experienced, licensed crew arrives on schedule every time. Whether it's weekly maintenance, a full remodel, or an emergency repair, we handle every detail with 35+ years of expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Picture Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, safe, and swim-ready all year long. With a family that's been in the water their whole lives, you can trust your pool is in the best hands in the East Bay.

about.label: Why East Bay Families Trust Us
about.headline: A Family of Swimmers Taking Care of Your Pool
about.description: Founded in 1990 by Brian Duncan — an All-American swimmer, former swim coach, and lifeguard — Picture Perfect Pool Services is built on a lifetime in the water. With C-61, D-35, and C-53 contractor's licenses, IPSSA leadership experience, and his son Sean by his side, Brian's family treats every pool like their own.

features.title: Triple Licensed Contractor
features.description: We hold C-61, D-35, and C-53 California contractor's licenses — covering every aspect of pool service, construction, and specialty work.

features.title: Family-Owned Since 1990
features.description: Brian and Sean Duncan personally oversee every project. When you call, you get the owner — not a call center.

features.title: IPSSA Industry Leadership
features.description: Brian served as East Bay IPSSA Chapter President and Regional Director. Your pool is maintained by someone who helped set industry standards.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool. From weekly maintenance to full construction — honest quotes, always.

guarantee.headline: Our "Picture Perfect" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't picture perfect after any service visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — at no extra charge. With 35+ years and thousands of pools behind us, we stake our family name on every job. Your satisfaction isn't just a policy, it's our reputation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new residential clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days. For urgent repairs or green pool situations, we offer expedited service. Call us at (925) 370-6675 and we'll get you on the schedule fast.

faqs.question: What makes Picture Perfect different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're a family-owned company with 35+ years of experience, triple California contractor's licenses (C-61, D-35, C-53), and IPSSA leadership credentials. Brian Duncan, our founder, is an All-American swimmer who has dedicated his life to pool care. You get the owner, not a revolving door of technicians.

faqs.question: Do you handle both maintenance and construction?
faqs.answer: Yes — we're a true full-service pool company. From weekly cleaning and chemical balancing to complete pool construction, remodeling, and equipment repair. Our three contractor's licenses mean we can handle any pool project in-house.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in the East Bay?
faqs.answer: We serve 20+ communities across the East Bay including Martinez, Pleasant Hill, Concord, Walnut Creek, Danville, San Ramon, Lafayette, Orinda, Antioch, Brentwood, Discovery Bay, and more. Call us to confirm service in your area.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial and HOA pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We've maintained commercial pools for HOAs, apartment complexes, and public facilities for decades. Our team ensures full compliance with health regulations, provides consistent scheduling, and delivers the reporting your management team needs.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: Picture Perfect Pool Services has provided outstanding service for our pool. Their team is knowledgeable, friendly, and always goes above and beyond. Highly recommend their services to anyone in the East Bay area.

testimonials.name: East Bay Homeowner
testimonials.text: Brian and his crew are extremely professional and reliable. They have been servicing our pool for years and the water is always crystal clear. The best pool service company in Contra Costa County.

testimonials.name: HOA Property Manager
testimonials.text: We have trusted Picture Perfect with our community pools for several years. Their commercial service is top-notch, always on schedule, and their communication is excellent. Five stars all around.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Picture Perfect
Pool?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool evaluation from a family that's been perfecting East Bay pools since 1990. Call today or fill out the form — we respond within 24 hours.

footer.description: Family-owned pool service serving the San Francisco East Bay since 1990. Triple licensed, IPSSA member, and trusted by 20+ communities.
